long_desc: This &RBlood&y dragon has a skin intensely red coloured.&n
detailed_desc:
This dragon has a skin intensely red coloured. Her pair of wings is closed, 
what makes it seems she is less dangerous she really is. There are several  
dark circular marks on her short neck, looking like sets of ebony colars.   
There are the same marks on his arms and legs, and the bright red of his    
torso makes you think of incandescent metal.                                
Her eyes take your attention, as they don't stop to look at you.
